# Task.Airat.Top

A smart, AI-powered personal task manager with local storage and task decomposition.

## Key Features
- AI Smart Tagging (Gemini AI)
- AI Task Decomposition
- Local Storage (Privacy-first)
- Light/Dark Mode
- Responsive Design

## Links
- Live: https://task.airat.top
- GitHub: https://github.com/AiratTop/task.airat.top
- Author: https://airat.top
- Email: mail@airat.top
